zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Corbet於大約1120年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛時，他的父親William Corbet Lord of Worthen32歲，母親Isabel de Valletort32歲。他於1155年之前與Mrs Thomas Corbet在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Corbet于大约1120年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛时，他的父亲William Corbet Lord of Worthen32岁，母亲Isabel de Valletort32岁。他于1155年之前与Mrs Thomas Corbet在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Corbet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: History: Walter Corbet, a royal knight in 12th-century Scotland, was the first of that name in that kingdom. His 13th-century descendants were major landholders in the Borders, and in the 14th century they acquired lands in the North of Scotland.

variants.name: Corbett
meanings: English (West Midlands, of Norman origin): nickname from Old French corbet ‘raven’, probably denoting someone with dark hair or a dark complexion.

History: This is the name of a family descended from Hugh Corbet, a Norman baron who settled in Shropshire following the Norman Conquest. One of his descendants, Sir Richard Corbet, was granted land near Shrewsbury in 1223; since the 13th century, this place has been known as Moreton Corbet. The name was taken from Shropshire to Scotland in the 12th century and to northern Ireland in the 17th century, and thence to North America by at least one group of bearers of the name.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Corbet was born about 1120, in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Corbet Lord of Worthen, was 32 and his mother, Isabel de Valletort, was 32. He married Mrs Thomas Corbet before 1155, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Corbet est né environ 1120, à Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Corbet Lord of Worthen, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Valletort, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Thomas Corbet avant 1155, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Corbet um 1120 in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Corbet Lord of Worthen 32 und seine Mutter Isabel de Valletort 32. Er hat vor 1155 in England Mrs Thomas Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Corbet è nato il circa 1120 nel Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Corbet Lord of Worthen, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Valletort, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Thomas Corbet prima del 1155, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Corbetが約1120年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアワットレスボロウで生まれた時，父William Corbet Lord of Worthenは32歳，母Isabel de Valletortは32歳であった。1155年以前にイギリスでMrs Thomas Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Corbet(이)가 대략 1120년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 왓틀레스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Corbet Lord of Worthen(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Valletort(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1155년 이전 영국에서 Mrs Thomas Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Corbet nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Corbet Lord of Worthen, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Valletort, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Thomas Corbet antes 1155, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Corbet родился около 1120 г. в местности ваттлесбороую, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Corbet Lord of Worthen было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Valletort, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Thomas Corbet перед 1155 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Corbet nació aproximadamente 1120, en Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Corbet Lord of Worthen, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Isabel de Valletort, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Mrs Thomas Corbet antes de 1155, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo.
